feature.name: relativedelta arithmetic core
feature.description: Extract python-dateutil relativedelta relative/absolute date arithmetic, normalization, and weekday helpers for naive datetime/date without rrule, parser, or timezone machinery.
included_behaviors: relativedelta construction with relative and absolute fields
datetime/date addition and subtraction with month/year rollover
weekday nth helpers MO..SU with setpos semantics
excluded_behaviors: dateutil.parser and general string date parsing
original dateutil package import at runtime

entanglement.description: Relative date arithmetic couples absolute vs relative field ordering, month-end clamping, weekday setpos jumps, fractional normalization cascades, and two-date diff iteration.
signals: absolute day/month/year replace before relative add
weekday MO(n) jumps after day replacement
diff mode iterates months until timedelta remainder fits

output.import: import featurelifted; from featurelifted import relativedelta, MO, TU, WE, TH, FR, SA, SU
